full_text:
Liu Yao 劉瑤
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Yao (劉瑤)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Liu Shan’s second son. Given his fiefdom in 238 but said to be of unremarkable talent. Liu Yao was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
